heading: Annual report
label: 715b Annual report
text: The commission created by shall, through its chairman, annually report in detail to Congress, not later than the first Monday in December, the operations of the commission during the preceding fiscal year.section 715a of this title
notes: Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of provisions of law requiring submittal to Congress of any annual, semiannual, or other regular periodic report listed in House Document No. 103–7 (in which a report required under this section is listed on page 177), see , as amended, set out as a note under , Money and Finance.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31
